calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Saul Ferster, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Gruber Family Partners, a California limited partnership, present by David Gruber.
Stephen McDonald, Esq. special appearance for Defendant: Emily Mills, also present.
11:55 a.m.- Parties and cousels are present and settled by stipulation.
Terms read into the record as follows: Defendant owes back rent for the sum of $2,983.05 and attorney's fee of $2,400.00, on or before 9-21-04 Defendant shall pay the first installment of $500.00, the remaining balance to be divided into 24 monthly installments, plus the current regular rent is due on October 15th, and the 15th of each month there after without any grace period. Payment made shall first applys to attorney's fee. All defects regarding the habitatbility complaint to landlord, defendant waived rights to withhold rent, Plaintiff to execute a month to month rent agreement, no sublet by the defendant, agreed to $25.00 late fee and $25.00 bad check fee, no dogs allowed, cat is permitted.
All waived claims against each other, money hold by landlord is for security deposit only, not for last month rent.
Counsel to reduced to writing and forward to Mr. McDonald for signature, and submit to court for approval.
Each agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is deedmed settled, trial vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar
